name: WOUNDS & WINGS
overview: “Wounds & Wings,” produced by Dayton Junior School in association with Jemo Art Studios, is a Ugandan drama series written and directed by award-winning filmmaker James Twino. The story follows Sarah, a resilient single mother, and her daughter Nina as they navigate poverty, corruption, and the dark secrets of Lutalo’s past. Across two seasons, their journey of education, justice, and family resilience unfolds in a gripping, emotional, and visually compelling narrative—showcasing Uganda’s emerging talent and cinematic growth.
